user_query:
Read both input/initiative.yaml and input/task.txt.

1) Use your team-based orchestration workflow with the 3-role preset "builder-security-operator" to execute the task described in input/task.txt. Before running, rename the "security" role to "Sentinel Kestrel". Then:
- Export the current team mapping (role keys to display names) to output/team.json.
- Execute the run with the task from input/task.txt and write the full structured JSON report to output/squad_report.json.
- Also write the markdown report contained in that JSON to output/squad_report.md.

2) Using the context from input/initiative.yaml, produce a comprehensive change management plan tailored to that initiative, following a structured framework with: an executive summary (1 paragraph), a full 10-section plan (Change Overview; Stakeholder Analysis using ADKAR; Communication Plan; Training & Enablement; Resistance Mitigation; Rollout Strategy; Success Metrics & Tracking; Risk Register; Timeline & Milestones; Budget Estimate), a quick-reference checklist (1-page summary), and an appendix with an ADKAR assessment template. Save this to output/plan.md.

3) Write a short rationale (one solid paragraph) explaining why you chose the "builder-security-operator" preset for this task and how you addressed security/privacy/compliance risks. Save this to output/rationale.txt.

Requirements:
- The JSON report must use schema version "aoi.squad.report.v0.1", the preset must be exactly "builder-security-operator", and the team must include the renamed nickname "Sentinel Kestrel" for the security role.
- Include at least one next action in the JSON report with priority "P1" and the action labeled "Review and refine outputs".
- Ensure all files are written under output/ using the exact filenames specified above.
